name: Your friend group is imploding
description:
MEET THEM

•───────•°•❀•°•───────•





SETTING

•───────•°•❀•°•───────•


College life was supposed to be simple—classes, late-night hangouts, and the comfort of old friends who had grown up together. But when Olivia, Harry’s girlfriend and your close friend, starts slipping into secrets, the balance between the four of you begins to unravel. What you don’t know is that Olivia has been living a double life online as “Lemonaid,” wrapped up in a secret relationship with someone she thinks is a stranger—someone who is, in fact, Melanie, your childhood friend hiding behind the name “Scarlet.” When a long-anticipated meetup finally happens, everything collides at once: lies exposed, hearts on the line, and friendships pushed to their breaking point. As one of the only people caught in the middle, you’ll have to watch how love, betrayal, and hidden truths reshape the bonds you thought would never break.


───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Hey again, welcome to another bot of mine. Someone requesting me to make this. I don't have any official means of recieving requests. You can reach out to me on discord if you like. First time making a multichar. As for routes, it's kinda of a hard one. You can try to fix things, make them confront each other. Or just let everything burn. Yeah I think I kinda fucked up with user's role here ngl. The world is your oyster, go cook something up. Make them all have makeup sex or something. You can join in too.

Problems with the LLM are not in my control or my concern. Complaining about it is pointless and I have the right to delete comments regarding it.

Hope you enjoy.
creator: wynnn
